title: Optical Image Collection
author: Guanshi Zhang
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.beumjeu6

steps.title: Before the matrix application, right after...
steps.instruction: Before the matrix application, right after defrosting in desiccator, the AF image (pre-AF) is captured on a confocal microscope. UTHSA: 10× objective on a Leica TSC SP8 PNNL: 20x objective on a Zeiss 710 LSM; 10x objective PALM MicroBeam (Zeiss inverse microscope Axiovert) 495 nm-720 nm, 404-488 nm and bright field channels are used for AF imaging with pinhole size 239 μm.

steps.title: Matrix application and MALDI-MSI (duplicates for...
steps.instruction: Matrix application and MALDI-MSI (duplicates for each sample at each spatial resolution).

steps.title: AF image are uploaded to METASPACE...
steps.instruction: AF image are uploaded to METASPACE and registered to corresponding MSI data.

steps.title: Air dry slides (after storage at...
steps.instruction: Air dry slides (after storage at -80 °C ) for 00:03:00 to 00:05:00 under the hood.

steps.title: Fix slides in ice cold acetone:methanol...
steps.instruction: Fix slides in ice cold acetone:methanol solution (1:1) for 00:10:00 to 00:15:00 at -20 °C

steps.title: Wash/rehydrate slides in distilled H2O for 00:10:00 to 00:15:00
steps.instruction: Wash/rehydrate slides in distilled H2O for 00:10:00 to 00:15:00

steps.title: Stain slides with hematoxylin for 00:00:20...
steps.instruction: Stain slides with hematoxylin for 00:00:20 to 00:00:30 Mayers hematoxylin solution Contributed by users

steps.title: Wash slides with distilled H2O for 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Wash slides with distilled H2O for 00:02:00

steps.title: Rinse slides with differentiating solution by...
steps.instruction: Rinse slides with differentiating solution by moving slides up and down 3-4 times within 00:00:05 . Then check the intensity of nuclear stianing under the microscope. If signal is too week, then go back to step 8 and do staining again for 00:00:05 to 00:00:10 , then rinse slides with distilled water again for 00:00:01 to 00:00:02 . Mastertech Differentiating Solution Contributed by users Catalog #HXD00188E

steps.title: Wash slides with distilled H2O for 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Wash slides with distilled H2O for 00:02:00

steps.title: Rinse slides with Bluing solution by...
steps.instruction: Rinse slides with Bluing solution by moving slides up and down for 00:00:05 to 00:00:10 Mastertech Bluing Solution American Master Tech Scientific Catalog #HXB00288E

steps.title: Wash slides with distilled H2O for 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Wash slides with distilled H2O for 00:02:00

steps.title: Stain slides with Eosin for 00:00:15...
steps.instruction: Stain slides with Eosin for 00:00:15 to 00:00:20 Eosin Solution Contributed by users

steps.title: Wash/dehydrate slides with 75% ethanol for...
steps.instruction: Wash/dehydrate slides with 75% ethanol for 00:01:00 to 00:02:00 75% Ethanol Contributed by users

steps.title: Dehydrate slides with 95% ethanol for...
steps.instruction: Dehydrate slides with 95% ethanol for 00:01:00 to 00:02:00 95% Ethanol Thermo Scientific

steps.title: Dehydrate slides with 100% ethanol for...
steps.instruction: Dehydrate slides with 100% ethanol for 00:02:00 (twice) 100% Ethanol Contributed by users

steps.title: Immerse slides in xylene for 00:02:00...
steps.instruction: Immerse slides in xylene for 00:02:00 (twice) Xylene Contributed by users

steps.title: Air dry slides under the hood for 00:03:00 to 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Air dry slides under the hood for 00:03:00 to 00:05:00

steps.title: Mount sections with Permount and cover...
steps.instruction: Mount sections with Permount and cover with coverslips Coverslips Contributed by users Chemical Permount Mounting Medium Fisher Scientific Catalog #SP15-100

steps.title: Stained amples are imaged using an Aperio ScanScope XT
steps.instruction: Stained amples are imaged using an Aperio ScanScope XT

steps.title: H&E images are uploaded to METASPACE...
steps.instruction: H&E images are uploaded to METASPACE and registered to the corresponding MSI data

steps.title: Slides are then re-stained with PAS
steps.instruction: Slides are then re-stained with PAS

steps.title: Place the slides in 10% formalin...
steps.instruction: Place the slides in 10% formalin in 95% alcohol for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Oxidize in 0
steps.instruction: Oxidize in 0.5% periodic acid solution for 00:05:00 0.5% Periodic Acid Solution (0.5g periodic acid in 100mL DI water) Contributed by users

steps.title: Rinse in tap water four times
steps.instruction: Rinse in tap water four times.

steps.title: Place in Schiff reagent for 00:15:00...
steps.instruction: Place in Schiff reagent for 00:15:00 Schiff’s reagent Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #3952016-500ML Sections become a light pink color

steps.title: Wash in lukewarm tap water for...
steps.instruction: Wash in lukewarm tap water for 00:05:00 Sections immediatly become a dark pink color

steps.title: Counterstain in Mayer's hematoxylin for 00:03:00...
steps.instruction: Counterstain in Mayer's hematoxylin for 00:03:00 Mayers hematoxylin solution Contributed by users

steps.title: Rinse in TBS solution and then...
steps.instruction: Rinse in TBS solution and then rinse in deionized water four times.

steps.title: Dehydrate by the successive ethanol and...
steps.instruction: Dehydrate by the successive ethanol and xylene steps 14 to 18 and coverslip using a synthetic mounting medium. 75% Ethanol Contributed by users 95% Ethanol Thermo Scientific 100% Ethanol Contributed by users Xylene Contributed by users Coverslips Contributed by users Chemical Permount Mounting Medium Fisher Scientific Catalog #SP15-100

steps.title: PAS slides from same tissue section...
steps.instruction: PAS slides from same tissue section as the H&E slide is imaged using Aperio ScanScope XT and uploaded to METASPACE and registered to the corresponding data.

steps.title: Rinse in tap water four times
steps.instruction: Rinse in tap water four times.
